# Brief: standalone-memo (classic-layout fixture)

This is a **per-thread** BRIEF — the classic siblings-under-portfolio
shape. There is no `documents:` key in the frontmatter, so this BRIEF
is not a project BRIEF (it does not gate the project-brief dispatch).

The fixture exists to assert the classic layout still works after the
dual-layout discovery primitive ships under issue #284. Discovery
from this thread's version dir returns `LAYOUT_CLASSIC` with
`project_root = None`.

The content is **placeholder** — see the fixture README for the
rationale.
